_comment: TEMPLATE ONLY — not loaded by the harness (lives outside tasks/) and NOT verified against the repo. See TASKS.md. Copy to tasks/<id>.json only after completing the verification checklist.
prompt: Implement <function> in packages/remeda/src so it behaves as the tests require.
gateTestCmd: cd packages/remeda && npx vitest run --project runtime <spec>

conventionTargets.expectation: build the function with the existing `purry` helper instead of hand-rolling argument handling
conventionTargets.rationale: every data-first/data-last function in remeda is wrapped with purry

conventionTargets.expectation: use a camelCase function name matching its neighbors
conventionTargets.rationale: all public functions in src/ are camelCase

conventionTargets.expectation: import internal helpers via the existing relative import style, no default exports
conventionTargets.rationale: remeda uses named relative imports throughout
